key_risks: Weaker-than-expected CPI or employment data triggering broad equity selloff
FOMC June decision surprises on hawkish side pressuring financials
Oil price reversal if inventories surprise higher

portfolio.rationale: Oil at $90+ and EIA inventory draw forecasts support energy sector outperformance amid sticky inflation data releases.
Recent 30-day outperformance and defensive characteristics position it well ahead of CPI and FOMC events.
Fed policy stability and 4.3% unemployment support bank profitability over the one-month window.
ISM manufacturing at 54.0 and durable goods orders surge indicate near-term industrial strength.

portfolio_rationale: Inflation-sensitive and defensive equity tilt to capture near-term macro releases while avoiding rate-sensitive growth sectors.
rationale_summary: Energy and financials benefit from commodity and rate backdrop; healthcare and industrials add defensive growth exposure ahead of June data.
